scripts.build:windows: CGO_ENABLED=1 GOOS=windows GOARCH=amd64 CC=x86_64-w64-mingw32-gcc CXX=x86_64-w64-mingw32-g++ go build -trimpath -ldflags "-s -w -H windowsgui -extldflags=-static" -o dist/obs-group-control-windows-amd64.exe ./cmd/obs-group-control
scripts.build:macos: CGO_ENABLED=1 GOOS=darwin GOARCH=arm64 CC=oa64-clang CXX=oa64-clang++ go build -trimpath -ldflags "-s -w" -o dist/obs-group-control-macos-arm64 ./cmd/obs-group-control
scripts.build:linux: CGO_ENABLED=1 GOOS=linux GOARCH=amd64 go build -trimpath -ldflags "-s -w -extldflags=-static" -tags netgo -o dist/obs-group-control-linux-amd64 ./cmd/obs-group-control
